title: dactylorhiza incarnata subsp. cilicica
intro: Dactylorhiza incarnata subsp. cilicica, also known as the Cilician Marsh Orchid, is a subspecies of the autumn-flowering Dactylorhiza incarnata, a type of orchid plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza incarnata subsp. cilicica include its potential to help manage respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
